name: Coding Agent
description: Autonomous full-stack coding agent. Plans, writes, runs, debugs, and verifies code completely independently. Handles any language or framework. System-wide file management. Can recall API specs or research from the shared workspace (RECALL_ARTIFACT) and save built integrations back (SAVE_ARTIFACT). When context contains an API spec from the research agent, uses it directly — no mock data.

input.context: optional — prior results from other agents, e.g. API spec from research agent

metadata.workspace: optional absolute path — defaults to coding_agent/workspace
metadata.session_id: injected by god agent for workspace scoping

output.result: summary of what was built, file paths created, how to run it
output.next_hint: optional — what the next agent should do with this output
